contract_summary: Get-wrapper: finds the merged label of two input labels (handling stale labels by automatically obtaining the newest versions) and returns it with an acquired reference. The caller takes ownership of the reference and must release it via aa_put_label() when done. If no merged label exists, returns NULL; the caller must check the return value. The function temporarily acquires references on newest versions of stale inputs but releases them before returning. The returned label's refcount has been incremented exactly once by __label_find_merge.
